title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Dark Theme
scenario: Color Theme switching does not apply immediately or persist across app restarts when Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, or Dark Theme is selected in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on a phone set to Dark Theme.
2. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme.
3. Verify the default selection is 'Follow Phone Theme' and a check mark is shown next to it.
4. Tap 'Light Theme'.
5. Observe the app UI immediately change to Light Theme and the check mark move to 'Light Theme'.
6. Force close the app and reopen it.
7. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme.
8. Verify 'Light Theme' is still selected (check mark remains).
9. Tap 'Dark Theme'.
10. Observe the app UI immediately change to Dark Theme and the check mark move to 'Dark Theme'.
11. Force close the app and reopen it.
12. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme.
13. Verify 'Dark Theme' is still selected (check mark remains).
14. Tap 'Follow Phone Theme'.
15. Observe the app UI immediately follow the phone's Dark Theme and the check mark move to 'Follow Phone Theme'.
16. Force close the app and reopen it.
17. Go to Home → Account → Color Theme.
18. Verify 'Follow Phone Theme' is still selected (check mark remains).
19. While in any theme, navigate through all app screens: DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings, Device Settings.
20. Verify all screens display correctly without visual artifacts, unreadable text, or broken layouts.
21. Tap the currently selected theme option again.
22. Verify nothing happens (no change, no deselect, no error).
expected: The selected Color Theme is applied immediately, persists across app restarts, all screens render correctly in the chosen theme, and tapping the already-selected theme has no effect.
